title: Ajaccio, Corsica — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Ajaccio, Corsica: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Ajaccio is a city in Corsica with a population of 71,000. The capital of Corsica, birthplace of Napoleon, with stunning Mediterranean beaches, dramatic mountains, and a unique island culture.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
